name: leetcode
title: LeetCode
description: Search LeetCode problem, view LeetCode daily challenge, view LeetCode problem and more.
author: justin0u0

commands.name: problem-search
commands.title: Search LeetCode Problems
commands.subtitle: LeetCode
commands.description: Search and preview the LeetCode problems.

commands.name: random-problem
commands.title: Pick a Random LeetCode Problem
commands.subtitle: LeetCode
commands.description: Pick a random LeetCode problem, optionally filtered by difficulty, category, and topic.

commands.name: user-profile
commands.title: View LeetCode User Profile
commands.subtitle: LeetCode
commands.description: View solve stats, streak, and contest rating for a username.

commands.name: potd-menu-bar
commands.title: Daily Challenge Status
commands.subtitle: LeetCode
commands.description: Menu bar timer showing whether you've solved the daily challenge and how long is left.

preferences.name: username
preferences.title: LeetCode Username
preferences.description: Your LeetCode username. Used by the daily challenge menu bar to check your status, and as the default for the profile command.

preferences.name: showProblemStats
preferences.title: Problem Stats
preferences.label: Show difficulty, likes, dislikes, and acceptance rate
preferences.description: If enabled, the problem's difficulty, likes, dislikes, and acceptance stats are shown above and below the problem description.

preferences.name: showProblemRatings
preferences.title: Problem Ratings
preferences.label: Show zerotrac difficulty ratings
preferences.description: If enabled, fetches community difficulty ratings from zerotrac and shows them next to each problem.
